nav.maintenance_warning: ScoutOff is currently under maintenance. Write actions are temporarily disabled.

player_dashboard.title: Player Dashboard
player_dashboard.register_prompt: Register first to view your profile.

wallet.selectProviderHint: Choose a Stellar wallet to connect with ScoutOff.
wallet.noWalletDetected: No wallet detected. Please install a Stellar wallet extension.

contractErrors.NotInitialized: The contract has not been set up yet. Please contact support.
contractErrors.PlayerNotFound: Player not found. Please check the player ID and try again.
contractErrors.UnauthorizedValidator: You are not authorised as a validator to perform this action.
contractErrors.InvalidMilestone: The specified milestone is invalid. Please verify the details.
contractErrors.AlreadyAtLevel: The player is already at this level.
contractErrors.InsufficientFee: Insufficient balance. Please add funds to your wallet.
contractErrors.SubscriptionExpired: Your subscription has expired. Please renew it to continue.
contractErrors.ContractPaused: The contract is currently paused. Please try again later.
contractErrors.Unauthorized: You are not authorised to perform this action.
contractErrors.NoFeesToWithdraw: There are no fees available to withdraw at this time.
contractErrors.Overflow: A calculation error occurred. Please try again.
contractErrors.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
